task_completion.description: Open the stream_crossing_aquatic_passage_audit project in QField
task_completion.visual_evidence: QField app is open and displaying a map or project workspace with the stream_crossing_aquatic_passage_audit project loaded.

task_completion.description: Access the stream_crossings layer and view feature attributes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer panel shows 'stream_crossings' selected, or the attribute table/feature list for stream crossings is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Open the edit form for a non-compliant stream crossing feature
task_completion.visual_evidence: A feature edit form is open showing attributes like outlet drop height, bankfull width, channel slope, structure type, or substrate type, with edit mode enabled.

task_completion.description: Change the aop_status of the non-compliant crossing to 'FAILING'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'aop_status' field in the feature edit form is visibly changed to 'FAILING'.

task_completion.description: Add a descriptive note to the passage_barrier_note field explaining the violation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text is entered into the 'passage_barrier_note' field that describes a specific USFS AOP design criteria violation (e.g., mentioning drop height, slope, or width ratio).

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the stream crossing record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the checkmark or save button in the edit form, returning to the map or feature list, or a save confirmation/toast is visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the QField GUI to make edits rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QField Android app interface (menus, forms, map). No terminal emulators (like Termux) or SQLite command-line interfaces are used.

integrity.description: Agent wrote a specific violation note rather than copy-pasting generic prompt text
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'passage_barrier_note' refers to specific attribute values or conditions of that exact feature, rather than just pasting the task description.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual QField application
integrity.visual_evidence: Visuals confirm the QField app environment, including its specific map rendering, layer panels, and QGIS-style edit forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target layer is 'stream_crossings' within the stream_crossing_aquatic_passage_audit.gpkg project. The agent must evaluate features based on USFS AOP design criteria (outlet drop height, outlet-to-bankfull width ratio, channel slope, structure type, and substrate type). The expected output file after saving is '/sdcard/stream_crossing_aquatic_passage_audit_result.gpkg'.
